pageContext.name: Captain Marvel
pageContext.description: This isn't a question of what I'm not. This is a question of who I could be.   Sideshow presents the Captain Marvel Fine Art Print, a powerful Marvel art print by Stanley 'Artgerm' Lau.  The Captain Marvel Fine Art Print shows a confident Carol Danvers as she takes flight to confront an unseen enemy in space. Her blonde hair sweeps up, aglow with the flames from the collapsing planet behind her. From her coiled muscles and shimmering red, gold, and blue suit to her determined expression and curled fist, Captain Marvel is undoubtedly poised for an epic battle. And she came to win.  Originally created as a variant cover for Captain Marvel #1 (2019) written by Kelly Thompson, this Marvel Comics collectible is now available to fans in a fine art format. Each Captain Marvel Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Sideshow Seal of Authenticity as part of the limited edition of 325 pieces. Available as an unframed, certified archival fine art print or in a custom framed presentation, this Marvel wall art makes an impressive addition to any collection.  Fly higher, further, faster when you bring home the Captain Marvel Fine Art Print by Stanley 'Artgerm' Lau today!
